description: Carnival Cruise Line is the world's most popular cruise line and operates multiple ships from Port Canaveral year-round. Carnival's Fun Ships offer affordable family-friendly cruises to the Bahamas, Eastern Caribbean, and Western Caribbean. Port Canaveral is one of Carnival's busiest homeports, with ships like the Carnival Celebration, Carnival Elation, and Carnival Liberty sailing regularly.
popularShips: Carnival Celebration, Carnival Liberty, Carnival Elation
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral is located 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). From MCO airport, the drive takes approximately 60 to 75 minutes. BusBrother provides direct group shuttle service with meet-and-greet pickup from any Orlando hotel, airport, or address. Our drivers know every terminal at Port Canaveral and deliver your group directly to the correct check-in entrance.
preCruiseHotels: Popular pre-cruise hotels near Port Canaveral include the Radisson Resort at the Port, Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach, Homewood Suites Cape Canaveral, Residence Inn Cape Canaveral, and Holiday Inn Express Cape Canaveral. Most offer park-and-cruise packages with parking while you sail.
tips: Arrive at the terminal no later than 90 minutes before departure for smooth check-in
Download the Carnival HUB app before your cruise for digital boarding pass and onboard features
Bring a waterproof phone case - Carnival ships have amazing water features and pool decks
checklist: Valid passport or birth certificate plus government-issued photo ID
Printed or digital boarding pass from Carnival website
Credit card for onboard account setup
Any pre-purchased excursion confirmations
Medications in carry-on (checked bags go to your stateroom later)
Swimsuit in carry-on for pool access on embarkation day

description: Royal Caribbean International sails some of the world's largest and most innovative cruise ships from Port Canaveral. The line offers itineraries to the Bahamas, Perfect Day at CocoCay, Eastern Caribbean, and Western Caribbean. Port Canaveral serves as a major homeport for Royal Caribbean's Oasis-class and Freedom-class vessels, making it one of the busiest embarkation points on the East Coast.
popularShips: Utopia of the Seas, Mariner of the Seas, Independence of the Seas
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral's Terminal 1 is approximately 60 miles east of Orlando International Airport via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). The drive takes about 60 to 75 minutes depending on traffic. BusBrother offers direct group transportation from any Orlando-area pickup point straight to Terminal 1, ensuring your party arrives together and on time for your sailing.
preCruiseHotels: Top pre-cruise hotels for Royal Caribbean guests include Radisson Resort at the Port (closest to terminal), Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, Residence Inn Cape Canaveral, Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach, and Hilton Cocoa Beach Oceanfront. Many offer park-and-cruise deals that include overnight stay plus parking for your cruise duration.
tips: Use the Royal Caribbean app to complete online check-in and get your assigned arrival time window
Crown and Anchor Society members at Gold level and above get priority check-in at Terminal 1
Pack a day bag with swimsuit and essentials - your checked luggage will arrive at your stateroom by evening
checklist: Valid passport or birth certificate plus government-issued photo ID
SetSail pass (digital boarding pass) on the Royal Caribbean app
Credit or debit card for onboard expenses
Luggage tags printed from your booking confirmation
Medications and valuables in your carry-on bag
Sunscreen and sunglasses for embarkation day pool time

description: Disney Cruise Line delivers magical family vacations from Port Canaveral, sailing to the Bahamas, Castaway Cay (Disney's private island), and the Caribbean. Known for exceptional entertainment, character meet-and-greets, themed dining, and world-class kids clubs, Disney cruises are a top choice for families. Port Canaveral is Disney Cruise Line's primary homeport and closest embarkation point to Walt Disney World.
popularShips: Disney Fantasy, Disney Wish, Disney Dream
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral Terminal 8 is roughly 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). From Walt Disney World, the drive is about 70 to 80 minutes heading east. BusBrother specializes in group transportation for Disney cruise families - we pick up from any Walt Disney World resort, Orlando hotel, MCO airport, or private address and drive you directly to Terminal 8.
preCruiseHotels: Many Disney cruise guests stay at Walt Disney World resorts the night before sailing. Closer options include Radisson Resort at the Port, Residence Inn Cape Canaveral, Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, and Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach. The Hyatt Regency Orlando Airport is a great option for late arrivals at MCO.
tips: Complete online check-in on the Disney Cruise Line website as soon as your window opens for the best port arrival times
Pack autograph books and pens in your carry-on - character meet-and-greets start on embarkation day
Bring glow sticks and pirate bandanas for Pirate Night - it is one of the most popular onboard events
checklist: Valid passport for all family members (required for Castaway Cay and Caribbean ports)
Printed or digital boarding documents from Disney Cruise Line
Credit card for onboard account
Comfortable shoes for exploring the ship on day one
Medications and baby supplies in carry-on bags
Autograph books, pens, and Disney-themed outfits for character photos

description: Norwegian Cruise Line brings its signature Freestyle Cruising experience to Port Canaveral with sailings to the Bahamas, Great Stirrup Cay (Norwegian's private island), and the Caribbean. Norwegian is known for flexible dining with no fixed seating times, outstanding entertainment including Broadway-style shows, and a wide range of cabin options from studios to luxury Haven suites.
popularShips: Norwegian Escape, Norwegian Epic, Norwegian Gem
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral Terminal 9 is located about 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). From MCO airport, expect a 60 to 75 minute drive. BusBrother provides reliable group shuttle service to Terminal 9, picking up from Orlando hotels, MCO airport, vacation rentals, or any address in the greater Orlando area. Our drivers are familiar with the terminal layout and drop-off procedures.
preCruiseHotels: Convenient pre-cruise hotels include Radisson Resort at the Port, Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach, Holiday Inn Express Cape Canaveral, and Courtyard by Marriott Cocoa Beach. Several offer park-and-cruise packages with parking included while you sail.
tips: Download the Norwegian Cruise Line app and complete online check-in to get your digital boarding pass
Haven suite guests get exclusive check-in, a private lounge, and priority boarding at the terminal
Bring a reusable water bottle - Norwegian has hydration stations throughout the ship
checklist: Valid passport or birth certificate plus government-issued photo ID
Digital or printed boarding pass from Norwegian Cruise Line
Credit card for onboard account charges
Printed luggage tags from your booking confirmation
Medications in carry-on bag
Light jacket for air-conditioned ship interiors

description: MSC Cruises is Europe's largest cruise line and has expanded significantly in North America with sailings from Port Canaveral. MSC offers a European-inspired cruise experience with international cuisine, Cirque du Soleil at Sea entertainment, and the exclusive Yacht Club ship-within-a-ship luxury concept. Ships sail to the Bahamas, Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve (MSC's private island), and the Caribbean.
popularShips: MSC Seascape, MSC Meraviglia, MSC Divina
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral Terminal 9 is about 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). The drive from MCO airport takes approximately 60 to 75 minutes. BusBrother handles group transportation to Terminal 9, picking up from any Orlando-area location. We ensure your group arrives with plenty of time for the MSC check-in process.
preCruiseHotels: Recommended pre-cruise hotels include Radisson Resort at the Port, Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, Residence Inn Cape Canaveral, Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach, and Homewood Suites Cape Canaveral. Book a park-and-cruise package to save on parking while you sail.
tips: MSC Yacht Club guests enjoy butler service, a private sundeck, and priority embarkation at the terminal
Download the MSC for Me app before boarding for digital check-in, deck plans, and onboard booking
Bring euros or US dollars for the onboard casino - MSC ships have a European-style gaming experience
checklist: Valid passport (required for all MSC sailings from Port Canaveral)
Printed or digital boarding pass from MSC Cruises
Credit card for onboard account
Luggage tags from your booking confirmation
Medications and essentials in carry-on
Power adapter if you have European devices (ships have both US and European outlets)

description: Virgin Voyages is the adults-only cruise line from Richard Branson, offering a fresh take on cruising with no kids, no buffets, and no extra charge for dining. Virgin Voyages ships feature tattoo parlors, DJ-driven pool parties, festival-style entertainment, and a rebellious attitude. Port Canaveral sailings head to the Bahamas, the Beach Club at Bimini, and the Caribbean.
popularShips: Scarlet Lady, Valiant Lady
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral's Terminal 10 is located about 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). The drive from Orlando International Airport is approximately 60 to 75 minutes. BusBrother offers group transportation perfect for Virgin Voyages sailing groups - bachelor and bachelorette parties, friend groups, and corporate retreats. We pick up from any Orlando-area location.
preCruiseHotels: Great pre-cruise hotels for Virgin Voyages guests include Radisson Resort at the Port, The Hilton Cocoa Beach Oceanfront, Courtyard by Marriott Cocoa Beach, Residence Inn Cape Canaveral, and Holiday Inn Express Cape Canaveral. The Cocoa Beach area has plenty of bars and restaurants for a pre-cruise night out.
tips: Virgin Voyages is 18-plus only - no one under 18 is permitted to sail
All restaurants are included in your fare with no extra charge - make reservations early for popular spots like The Test Kitchen
Pack festival-style outfits for the Scarlet Night party - it is the signature event of every sailing
checklist: Valid passport (required for all Virgin Voyages sailings)
Digital boarding pass from the Virgin Voyages app
Credit card for onboard purchases
Government-issued photo ID matching your booking name
Medications in carry-on
Party outfits for themed nights and the Scarlet Night event

description: Margaritaville at Sea brings Jimmy Buffett's laid-back island lifestyle to the open ocean with fun, affordable short cruises from Port Canaveral. The line offers 2 to 5-night sailings to the Bahamas, Grand Bahama Island, and Nassau, making it perfect for quick getaways. Expect island-themed entertainment, tropical cocktails, Cheeseburger in Paradise restaurants, and a relaxed party atmosphere.
popularShips: Margaritaville at Sea Islander, Margaritaville at Sea Paradise
gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral Terminal 3 is about 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). From MCO airport, the drive is roughly 60 to 75 minutes. BusBrother provides group transportation for Margaritaville at Sea guests, picking up from Orlando hotels, airports, and homes. Our service is ideal for groups looking for a hassle-free ride to the port.
preCruiseHotels: Convenient pre-cruise hotels include Radisson Resort at the Port, Country Inn and Suites Cape Canaveral, Hampton Inn Cocoa Beach, and Holiday Inn Express Cape Canaveral. For a beachside experience before your cruise, try the Hilton Cocoa Beach Oceanfront or International Palms Resort.
tips: Margaritaville at Sea offers some of the most affordable cruise fares from Port Canaveral - great for first-time cruisers
Bring a Hawaiian shirt or tropical outfit for the island-themed parties onboard
The ships offer all-inclusive beverage packages at a reasonable price - consider adding one at booking
checklist: Valid passport or birth certificate plus government-issued photo ID
Boarding pass from Margaritaville at Sea
Credit card for onboard account
Comfortable casual clothing and swimwear
Medications in carry-on
Sunscreen and a hat for outdoor deck activities

description: Celebrity Cruises offers a premium cruise experience from Port Canaveral with modern luxury, award-winning dining, and sophisticated entertainment. Celebrity ships are known for their stunning design, wellness-focused spas, and The Retreat - an exclusive suite-class experience. Sailings from Port Canaveral visit the Bahamas, Eastern Caribbean, and Western Caribbean destinations.

gettingThereContent: Port Canaveral Terminal 1 is about 60 miles east of Orlando via SR-528 (Beachline Expressway). From MCO airport, expect a 60 to 75 minute drive. We pick up from Orlando hotels, resorts, airports, and private addresses.

These offer the comfort and quality Celebrity guests expect.
tips: The Retreat guests enjoy exclusive check-in, a private lounge, and priority boarding at the terminal

eCruise boarding pass from Celebrity Cruises website or app
Credit card for onboard account

description: Carnival Cruise Line operates year-round sailings from Port Tampa Bay to the Western Caribbean, Mexico, and Cozumel. Tampa is one of Carnival's most popular homeports on the Gulf Coast, offering convenient access for residents of Central and West Florida. Carnival ships from Tampa visit destinations like Cozumel, Grand Cayman, Belize, Roatan, and Progreso.
popularShips: Carnival Paradise, Carnival Valor, Carnival Pride
gettingThereContent: Port Tampa Bay is located on Hooker's Point in Tampa, about 15 minutes from Tampa International Airport via I-275 and the Crosstown Expressway. From Orlando, the drive is approximately 75 to 90 minutes via I-4 West. BusBrother offers group shuttle service from Orlando, Tampa, and surrounding areas directly to Terminal 6 at Port Tampa Bay.
preCruiseHotels: Popular pre-cruise hotels near Port Tampa Bay include the Hilton Garden Inn Tampa Ybor Historic District, Hampton Inn Tampa Ybor City, Tampa Marriott Water Street, Aloft Tampa Downtown, and Embassy Suites Tampa Downtown. Ybor City offers a fun night out before your cruise with historic restaurants and nightlife.
tips: Tampa's cruise terminal is much smaller and less crowded than Port Canaveral or Fort Lauderdale - enjoy the faster check-in
If arriving the night before, explore Ybor City's restaurants and nightlife - it is only 10 minutes from the port
Western Caribbean itineraries from Tampa are longer voyages - pack accordingly for 5 to 7-night sailings
checklist: Valid passport (strongly recommended for Western Caribbean ports of call)
Printed or digital boarding pass from Carnival website
Credit card for onboard account setup
Luggage tags from your booking confirmation
Medications in carry-on bag
Casual warm-weather clothing and swimwear

description: Royal Caribbean sails from Port Tampa Bay with itineraries to the Western Caribbean, Mexico, Honduras, and Belize. Tampa offers a more relaxed embarkation experience compared to larger ports, and Royal Caribbean's ships departing from Tampa provide the same world-class entertainment, dining, and amenities. Expect destinations like Cozumel, Costa Maya, Grand Cayman, and Roatan.
popularShips: Brilliance of the Seas, Grandeur of the Seas, Serenade of the Seas

From Orlando, the drive takes approximately 75 to 90 minutes heading west on I-4. BusBrother provides group transportation from Orlando, Tampa, St. Petersburg, and surrounding areas to Terminal 2 at Port Tampa Bay.
preCruiseHotels: Recommended pre-cruise hotels include Tampa Marriott Water Street, Hilton Garden Inn Tampa Ybor Historic District, Hampton Inn Tampa Ybor City, Embassy Suites Tampa Downtown, and Hyatt Place Tampa Downtown. Tampa's Riverwalk and Water Street districts offer excellent dining and entertainment the night before sailing.
tips: Complete online check-in via the Royal Caribbean app and download your SetSail pass before arriving at the terminal
Port Tampa Bay parking is more affordable than other Florida ports - on-site parking runs about $15 per day
Tampa departures typically head to Western Caribbean ports - great for visiting Mexico and Central America
checklist: Valid passport (required for Western Caribbean itineraries visiting Mexico and Central America)
SetSail pass (digital boarding pass) from the Royal Caribbean app
Credit card for onboard expenses
Printed luggage tags from booking confirmation
Medications and essentials in carry-on
Rain jacket or light layer for port days

Celebrity ships from Tampa visit destinations like Cozumel, Grand Cayman, and Key West. tips: Celebrity's seasonal Tampa departures are less crowded than year-round homeports - enjoy a more relaxed embarkation

Known for elegant ships, enrichment programs, exceptional dining through the Culinary Council, and a more traditional cruise experience, Holland America appeals to experienced cruisers and mature travelers who appreciate culture, cuisine, and comfort.

gettingThereContent: Port Tampa Bay Terminal 3 is roughly 15 minutes from Tampa International Airport via I-275 and the Crosstown Expressway. From Orlando, the drive takes approximately 75 to 90 minutes via I-4 West. BusBrother provides comfortable group transportation to Terminal 3, ideal for Holland America guests who want a smooth, stress-free transfer from any pickup location.
preCruiseHotels: Refined pre-cruise hotels for Holland America guests include the JW Marriott Tampa Water Street, Le Meridien Tampa, Tampa Marriott Water Street, Grand Hyatt Tampa Bay, and The Don CeSar in nearby St. Pete Beach. tips: Holland America's Club Orange premium dining is worth the upgrade - it includes a dedicated restaurant and priority services

description: Royal Caribbean International operates a massive fleet from Port Everglades in Fort Lauderdale, one of the busiest cruise ports in the world. Ships sail to the Bahamas, Perfect Day at CocoCay, Eastern Caribbean, Western Caribbean, Southern Caribbean, and even transatlantic voyages. Port Everglades is home to some of Royal Caribbean's newest and largest vessels.
popularShips: Allure of the Seas, Odyssey of the Seas, Symphony of the Seas
gettingThereContent: Port Everglades is located in Fort Lauderdale, just 3 miles from Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL). From Miami International Airport, the drive is about 30 to 40 minutes via I-95 or the Florida Turnpike. From Orlando, the drive is approximately 3.5 to 4 hours via the Florida Turnpike. BusBrother provides group transportation from Orlando, Miami, and all South Florida locations directly to Port Everglades terminals.
preCruiseHotels: Top pre-cruise hotels near Port Everglades include the Hilton Fort Lauderdale Marina, Hyatt Regency Pier Sixty-Six, Courtyard by Marriott Fort Lauderdale Cruise Port, Renaissance Fort Lauderdale Cruise Port Hotel, and B Ocean Resort on Fort Lauderdale Beach. Many are within 5 minutes of the port.
tips: Port Everglades can be extremely busy on turnaround days - arrive during your assigned window to avoid long waits
FLL airport is the closest airport to any major cruise port in the US - consider flying in the morning of your cruise
Uber and Lyft are readily available at Port Everglades, but BusBrother is the best option for groups of 6 or more
checklist: Valid passport (required for most itineraries from Fort Lauderdale)
SetSail pass from the Royal Caribbean app
Credit card for onboard account
Printed luggage tags from booking confirmation
Medications and valuables in carry-on bag
Sunscreen for embarkation day on the pool deck

Port Everglades is one of Norwegian's busiest homeports.
popularShips: Norwegian Encore, Norwegian Getaway, Norwegian Sky
gettingThereContent: Port Everglades is 3 miles from Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL). From Miami, the drive takes about 30 to 40 minutes via I-95. From Orlando, it is approximately 3.5 to 4 hours via the Florida Turnpike. BusBrother provides group transportation from Orlando and all Florida locations to Port Everglades for Norwegian sailings.
preCruiseHotels: Top pre-cruise hotels for Norwegian guests include Hilton Fort Lauderdale Marina, Courtyard by Marriott Fort Lauderdale Cruise Port, Renaissance Fort Lauderdale Cruise Port Hotel, Hampton Inn Fort Lauderdale Cruise Port, and Embassy Suites Fort Lauderdale 17th Street. All are within minutes of the port.
tips: Norwegian's Haven suite guests enjoy exclusive check-in, a private lounge, and dedicated concierge service at the terminal
Download the Norwegian Cruise Line app for digital check-in and your boarding pass
The Free at Sea promotion often includes free drinks, WiFi, and specialty dining - check for current offers when booking
checklist: Valid passport (required for Caribbean sailings from Fort Lauderdale)
Digital or printed boarding pass from Norwegian Cruise Line
Credit card for onboard account
Printed luggage tags from booking confirmation
Medications in carry-on
Casual and dressy outfits - Norwegian has relaxed dress codes but specialty restaurants appreciate smart casual
